/usr/bin/c++   -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -g   CMakeFiles/memeware.dir/src/verymeme/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeware.dir/src/verymeme/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeware.dir/src/verymeme/geom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeware.dir/src/verymeme/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeware.dir/src/memeware/microcode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memeware.dir/src/programs/memeware.cpp.o  -o memeware verilog/libverilated_library.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_stacktrace_backtrace.so
